ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_text" TEXT /* Text description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "valence" TEXT /* Valence of the item (positive or negative) */,
  "intimacy_mean" REAL /* Average level of personal connection to the item */,
  "intimacy_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of personal connection to the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the item */,
  "item_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., predefined, user-defined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating for the item */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment on the item */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Whether the user has shared the item */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was created */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, like, share, comment) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the item */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the item */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the shared item */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the item was shared */,
  "sharing_note" TEXT /* Note accompanying the shared item */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private, group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sharing_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ratings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., predefined, user-defined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_item_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "similarity_value" REAL /* Similarity value between the user and item */,
  "similarity_date" TEXT /* Date the similarity was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_item_similarity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_item_similarity_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_item_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity record */,
  "item_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first item */,
  "item_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second item */,
  "similarity_value" REAL /* Similarity value between the two items */,
  "similarity_date" TEXT /* Date the similarity was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_item_similarity_item_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_2") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_item_similarity_item_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_1") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_clusters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clusters_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
